Specification
Brand Easydrive
Collated/Uncollated Uncollated
Construction Material (Screws) A2 Stainless Steel
Head Type Bolt
Head Type Description Bolt Head for a Secure High Driving Force
Indoor/Outdoor Usage Indoor & Outdoor
Manufacturer Guarantee 1 Year Guarantee
Pack Size 10
Pieces in Pack/Case 10
Product Type Coach Screws
Resistant Type Corrosion-Resistant
Screw Coating Uncoated
Screw Diameter 6mm
Screw Diameter (mm) 6 mm
Screw Finish Stainless Steel
Screw Length 50mm
Screw Length (mm) 50 mm
Screw Pilot Hole Requirements Pre-Drilling Required in Wood
Screwdriver Type Hex
Thread Length Partially Threaded
